title: November 9
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 9''' is the 313th day of the year (314th in leap years), with 52 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1973]] – [[Alyson Court]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Natacha Bustos]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 21|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 21]] published.
*[[1985]] – "[[Tail of the Roon Comets]]" of [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Droids'']] airs on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*1985 – "[[Wicket's Wagon]]" of [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] airs on ABC.
*1985 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 125|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 125]] published.
*[[1989]] – [[Billy Howle]] is born.
*[[2003]] – [[Art Carney]] dies.
*[[2005]] – [[Republic 79|''Republic'' 79]] published.
*2005 – [[Empire 37|''Empire'' 37]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Poe Dameron 8|''Poe Dameron'' 8]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Sage Groves]] is born.
*2021 – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: The Bogan Collection|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: The Bogan Collection]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Insider: The Fiction Collection Volume 2]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars Legends: Boba Fett – Blood Ties]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: The Life Day Cookbook]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian: The Tiny Book of Grogu]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – [[The High Republic (2022) 2|''The High Republic'' (2022) 2]] published.
*2022 – "[[One Way Out]]" of ''[[Star Wars: Andor]]'' released.
*2022 – [[Carlos Pacheco]] dies.
*[[2023]] – "[[An Adventure with Yoda / The Talon Takeover]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Character Encyclopedia]]'' published in the UK.
